blocks.text: Now let me run the DESeq2 analysis in R:

input.code:
# Load DESeq2 and other libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)

# Set working directory
setwd(Sys.getenv('WORK_DIR'))

# Load counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1)

# Ensure counts is a matrix (not data frame)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)

print(paste0("Counts: ", nrow(counts), " genes × ", ncol(counts), " cells"))
print(paste0("Metadata: ", nrow(metadata), " samples"))
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Assemble DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                               colData = metadata,
                               design = ~ cell_type)

print("DESeqDataSet created")
print(dds)
